issue_title: Implement Telegram channel compatibility for Antigravity session control
issue_body:
## Overview
Implement integration with the `tg-relay` daemon to support driving Antigravity sessions and resolving tool confirmations remotely via Telegram.

## Acceptance criteria
- [x] Route inbound Telegram channel messages (notified via `notifications/claude/channel`) into the main CLI user input loop
- [x] Serialize message metadata as attributes on the `<channel>` wrapper tag to support channel features (e.g., heartbeats)
- [x] Subscribe to the `TOOL_CONFIRMATION_REQUEST` bus and forward requests to all connected channel MCP clients as `notifications/claude/channel/permission_request`
- [x] Route decision replies (`notifications/claude/channel/permission`) back to the main confirmation message bus to resolve interactive allow/deny queries

## Tests
- [x] Unit tests for MCP client notification schemas and event routing
- [x] Unit tests for client manager subscribing to the tool confirmation bus and publishing decisions

## Verification
- [x] Build passes with no type errors
- [x] ESlint checks and typechecks run successfully with no errors or warnings
notes: Feature Request: Telegram channel compatibility for Antigravity session control.
